required_preferences.fact: Commits to managing a high volume of concurrent clients under an accelerator retainer for one year, prioritizing ongoing contract review and risk management for early-stage startups — accepts the retainer’s defined roster and no longer overbooks independent projects outside the accelerator’s scope during this period

supersedes.fact: Actively seeks new projects and is open to taking on more than five clients short-term to compensate for lost income — willing to overbook until her roster stabilizes

required_preferences.fact: Attends weekly in-person meetings downtown every Wednesday as mandated by the accelerator contract — client meetings can now be scheduled at coworking spaces or downtown on additional days as needed to accommodate expanded roster

supersedes.fact: Blocks out Tuesday and Thursday mornings exclusively for client meetings at coworking spaces — never schedules them at home or on other days

required_preferences.fact: Prepares new course materials for the university sessions during Sunday afternoons — reserves this time exclusively for lesson planning and grading
Keeps all contract drafts in secure cloud folders organized by client — refuses to use physical paperwork for legal documents
Uses a dedicated home office setup with upgraded camera and lighting for live teaching sessions — does not use coworking spaces or public locations for university classes
Sends a short good-morning message to her partner every day — considers this essential for staying connected across the distance

persona: An independent freelance consultant who regularly drafts contracts for clients
